name: Jacques Demy
abstract: Jacques Demy (French: [ʒak dəmi]; 5 June 1931 – 27 October 1990) was a French director, screenwriter and lyricist. He appeared at the height of the French New Wave alongside contemporaries like Jean-Luc Godard and François Truffaut.

about_quotes.speaker: Quincy Jones
about_quotes.evidence: He said, “I’d like you to come to Nantes.” ... “and I’ve got a picture here that I would like you to do.” ... He wrote a lyric, and that woman was just mouthing the lyrics. ... I said, “Yeah, I’ll do it.”
about_quotes.doc_title: Quincy Jones — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
